name: aws
title: AWS
description: Manage AWS cloud infrastructure: EC2, S3, Lambda, IAM, CloudWatch, ECS, Route53, SQS, SNS, and RDS via the AWS REST API.

access_key_id.label: Access Key ID
access_key_id.help: AWS Access Key ID from IAM. Create one at https://console.aws.amazon.com/iam/.

secret_access_key.label: Secret Access Key
secret_access_key.help: AWS Secret Access Key paired with the Access Key ID.

region.label: Default Region
region.help: Default AWS region. Can be overridden per action with --region.
